Name: Forgery Kit
Text:
Ability: Dexterity

Utilize: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else's handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20)

If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Name: Fork of Eddy Summoning
Text: This Diminuto tuning fork crackles with harmless, multicolored magical energy. As a Magic action, you can tap the fork against any object to summon an Eldritch Eddy (see appendix B). The eddy appears in an unoccupied space as close to you as possible. The eddy is Friendly to you and your allies, and it obeys your commands. If you fail to command it, the eddy defends itself against attackers but recibe no other actions. It recibe its turn immediately after you on your Initiative count. The eddy disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it as a Bonus Action. The fork can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

Name: Frost Brand
Text:
When you hit with an attack roll using this magic arma, el objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 Cold dano. In addition, while you hold the arma, you have Resistance to Fire dano.

In freezing temperatures, the arma sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 pies.

When you draw this arma, you can extinguish all nonmagical flames within 30 pies of yourself. Once used, this property can't be used again for 1 hour.

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Text: Trinkets from the Frostfell and Evericed8Trinket1A Pequeno prism carved from ice that doesn't melt2A rusted iron coin, depicting a dwarf lord and the worlds "Five Rex Undra"3A pair of eight-sided dice carved from ice that doesn't melt4A swatch of silvery fur that's cold to the touch, possibly from a winter wolf5A snowball; it doesn't melt and can't be compressed into ice6A Diminuto white Dragon sculpted from ice that doesn't melt7A key carved from ice that doesn't melt8A single scale from a white Dragon

Name: Fulminating Treatise
Text:
This thick, scorched spellbook reeks of smoke and ozone, and sparks of energy crackles along the edges of its pages. When found, the book contains the following spells: contingency, fireball, gust of wind, Leomund's Diminuto hut, magic missile, thunderwave, and wall of force. It functions as a spellbook for you.

While you are holding the book, you can use it as a spellcasting focus for your wizard spells.

The book has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can use the charges in the following ways while holding it:

If you spend 1 minute studying the book, you can expend 1 charge to replace one of your prepared wizard spells with a different spell in the book. The new spell must be of the evocation school.When una criatura you can see recibe dano from an evocation spell you cast, you can use your reaction and expend 1 charge to deal an extra 2d6 force dano to the creature and knock the creature derribado if it is Grande or smaller.

Name: Galley
Damage: Speed: 4 mphCarrying Capacity: 150 tons cargoCrew 80, AC 15, HP 500, dano Threshold 20
Text:
Speed. A ship sailing against a strong wind moves at half speed. In a dead calm (no wind), waterborne ships can't move under sail and must be rowed. Keelboats and Rowboats are used on lakes and rivers. If going downstream, add the speed of the current (typically 3 miles per hour) to the speed of the vehicle. These vehicles can't be rowed against any significant current, but they can be pulled upstream by draft animals on the shores. A Rowboat can be carried and weighs 100 pounds.

Crew. A ship larger than a Keelboat or Rowboat needs a crew of skilled hirelings (see "Services") to function. The minimum number of skilled hirelings needed to crew a ship depends on the type of ship.

Passengers. The number of Pequeno and Mediano passengers the ship can accommodate using hammocks. A ship outfitted with private accommodations can carry one-fifth as many passengers. A passenger usually pays 5 SP per day for a hammock, but prices can vary from ship to ship. A Pequeno private cabin usually costs 2 GP per day.

dano Threshold. See the rules glossary.

Ship Repair. Repairs to a damaged ship can be made while the vessel is berthed. Repairing 1 Hit Point of dano requires 1 day and costs 20 GP for materials and labor. If the repairs are made in a location where supplies and skilled labor are abundant, such as a city shipyard, the repair time and cost are halved.

Name: Gaming Set
Text:
If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

Dice SetDragonchess SetPlaying CardsThree-Dragon Ante Set

Name: Garb of Light and Shadow
Text: This garb appeals to Feerico from one Domain of Delight, such as the Gloaming Court or the Summer Court. While wearing the garb, you have Advantage on ability checks to influence Feerico associated with that Domain of Delight.

Name: Gate Warden Trinket
Text: d6Trinket1A Diminuto vial pendant filled with a drop of honey that glows faintly2A Pequeno lead ingot that has a strange thumbprint pressed into it and whispers when held tightly3Two lodestone spheres that chime when they attract each other4A smoldering pebble of coal that, while always hot, doesn't burn skin, fur, scales, or clothing5A feather that sheds dim light in a 5-foot radius6A anillo made from a chain link that, once donned, won't come off without pulling painfully hard

Name: Gauntlets of Flaming Fury
Text: While you wear both of these steel gauntlets, any non-magical arma you grasp with either gauntlet is treated as a magic arma. As a bonus action, you can use the gauntlets to cause magical flames to envelop one or two melee weapons in your grasp. Each flaming arma deals an extra 1d6 fire dano on a hit. The flames last until you sheath or let go of either arma. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

Name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
Text: Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect on you if your Strength is 19 or higher without them.

Name: Gavel of the Venn Rune
Text:
This wooden gavel is Pequeno by Gigante reckoning but nearly the size of a warhammer in human hands. The venn (friend) rune is inscribed in mithral in the base of the haft. Among giants, this item is used as part of rituals to resolve disputes. The gavel has the following properties.

Arbiters escudo. At the start of every combat, attack rolls against you have disadvantage before the start of your first turn, provided that the gavel is on your person.

Bond of Amity. As an action, you can use the gavel to strike a point on a hard surface. The first time in the next minute that a creature within 60 pies of that point deals dano to another creature with an attack that hits, the attacker recibe psychic dano equal to half the dano it dealt to el objetivo. Once you use this property, you can't use it again until you finish a descanso largo.

Gift of Truth. You can transfer the gavel's magic to a place by tracing the venn rune on the ground with your finger. The point where you trace it becomes the center of a spherical area of magic that has a 30-foot radius and that is fixed to the place. The transfer recibe 8 hours of work that requires the gavel to be within 5 pies of you. At the end, the gavel is destroyed, and the area gains the following property:

Whenever a creature utters a lie while within the 30-foot-radius sphere, that creature recibe 5 psychic dano and flinches visibly.

Name: Gem Card
Text: This card holds one 6th-level spell (chosen by the DM). As an action, you can brandish this card and use it to cast the spell stored inside (spell attack bonus +9, save DC 17). Once this property is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

Name: Gem of Brightness
Text:
This prism has 50 charges. While you are holding it, you can take a Magic action and use one of three command words to cause one of the following effects:

First Command Word. The gem sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 pies. This effect doesn't expend a charge. It lasts until you take a Bonus Action to repeat the command word or until you use another function of the gem.

Second Command Word. You expend 1 charge and cause the gem to fire a brilliant beam of light at una criatura you can see within 60 pies of yourself. The creature debe superar a DC 15 Constitution tirada de salvacion or have the cegado condition for 1 minute. The creature repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Third Command Word. You expend 5 charges and cause the gem to flare with intense light in a 30-foot Cone. cada criatura in the Cone makes a tirada de salvacion as if struck by the beam created with the second command word.

When all of the gem's charges are expended, the gem becomes a nonmagical jewel worth 50 GP.

Name: Gem of Seeing
Text:
This gem has 3 charges. As a Magic action, you can expend 1 charge. For the next 10 minutes, you have Vision verdadera out to 120 pies when you peer through the gem.

The gem regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

Name: Genie Robe
Text: This robe appeals to Elementals associated with a particular Elemental Plane (Air, Earth, Fire, Water). While wearing a Genie Robe, you have Advantage on ability checks made to influence Elementals associated with that plane.

Name: Ghost Lantern
Text:
A restless spirit is trapped inside this lantern. While holding the lantern, you can command the spirit as a bonus action to shed bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 pies.

While holding the lantern, you can use an action to order the spirit to leave the lantern and duplicate the effect of the mage hand spell. The spirit returns to the lantern when the spell ends.

If you fall inconsciente within 10 pies of the lantern, the spirit emerges from it, magically stabilizes you with a touch, and then quickly returns to the lantern.

The spirit is bound to the lantern and can't be harmed, turned, or raised from the dead.

Casting a dispel maligno and bueno spell on the lantern releases the spirit to the afterlife and renders the lantern nonmagical.

Name: Ghost Step Tattoo
Text:
Produced by a special needle, this tattoo shifts and wavers on the skin, parts of it appearing blurred.

Tattoo Attunement. To attune to this item, you hold the needle to your skin where you want the tattoo to appear, pressing the needle there throughout the attunement process. When the attunement is complete, the needle turns into the ink that becomes the tattoo, which appears on the skin.

If your attunement to the tattoo ends, the tattoo vanishes, and the needle reappears in your space.

Ghostly Form. The tattoo has 3 charges, and it regains all expended charges daily at dawn. As a bonus action while the tattoo is on your skin, you can expend 1 of the tattoo's charges to become incorporeal hasta el final de your next turn. For the Duracion, you gain the following benefits:

You have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing dano from nonmagical attacks.You can't be agarrado or apresado.You can move through creatures and solid objects as if they were difficult terrain. If you end your turn in a solid object, you take 1d10 force dano. If the effect ends while you are inside a solid object, you instead are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space, and you take 1d10 force dano for every 5 pies traveled.

Name: Gigante Slayer
Text:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack rolls and dano rolls made with this magic arma.

When you hit a Gigante with this arma, the Gigante recibe an extra 2d6 dano of the arma's type and debe superar a DC 15 Strength tirada de salvacion or have the derribado condition.

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Antimatter Rifle (Gigante Slayer Antimatter Rifle)Automatic Rifle (Gigante Slayer Automatic Rifle)Battleaxe (Gigante Slayer Battleaxe)Blowgun (Gigante Slayer Blowgun)Club (Gigante Slayer Club)Dagger (Gigante Slayer Dagger)Dart (Gigante Slayer Dart)Double-Bladed Scimitar (Gigante Slayer Double-Bladed Scimitar)Flail (Gigante Slayer Flail)Glaive (Gigante Slayer Glaive)Greataxe (Gigante Slayer Greataxe)Greatclub (Gigante Slayer Greatclub)Greatsword (Gigante Slayer Greatsword)Halberd (Gigante Slayer Halberd)Hand Crossbow (Gigante Slayer Hand Crossbow)Handaxe (Gigante Slayer Handaxe)Heavy Crossbow (Gigante Slayer Heavy Crossbow)Hooked Shortspear (Gigante Slayer Hooked Shortspear)Hoopak (Gigante Slayer Hoopak)Hunting Rifle (Gigante Slayer Hunting Rifle)Javelin (Gigante Slayer Javelin)Lance (Gigante Slayer Lance)Laser Pistol (Gigante Slayer Laser Pistol)Laser Rifle (Gigante Slayer Laser Rifle)Light Crossbow (Gigante Slayer Light Crossbow)Light Hammer (Gigante Slayer Light Hammer)Light Repeating Crossbow (Gigante Slayer Light Repeating Crossbow)Longbow (Gigante Slayer Longbow)Longsword (Gigante Slayer Longsword)Mace (Gigante Slayer Mace)Maul (Gigante Slayer Maul)Morningstar (Gigante Slayer Morningstar)Musket (Gigante Slayer Musket)Pike (Gigante Slayer Pike)Pistol (Gigante Slayer Pistol)Quarterstaff (Gigante Slayer Quarterstaff)Rapier (Gigante Slayer Rapier)Revolver (Gigante Slayer Revolver)Scimitar (Gigante Slayer Scimitar)Semiautomatic Pistol (Gigante Slayer Semiautomatic Pistol)Shortbow (Gigante Slayer Shortbow)Shortsword (Gigante Slayer Shortsword)Shotgun (Gigante Slayer Shotgun)Sickle (Gigante Slayer Sickle)Sling (Gigante Slayer Sling)Spear (Gigante Slayer Spear)baston (Gigante Slayer baston)Trident (Gigante Slayer Trident)War Pick (Gigante Slayer War Pick)Warhammer (Gigante Slayer Warhammer)Whip (Gigante Slayer Whip)Wooden baston (Gigante Slayer Wooden baston)Yklwa (Gigante Slayer Yklwa)

Name: Gigante Trinket
Text:
While exploring your home, you discovered some trivial remnant of the ancient inhabitants, as determined by rolling on the Gigante Trinkets table. The items in parentheses are the normal-sized objects most analogous to the described Gigante trinkets.

Gigante Trinketsd6Giant Trinket1A Gigante's toothpick (a dagger)2A Gigante's handkerchief (a blanket)3A Gigante's marble (a crystal orb)4A Gigante's match (a torch)5A Gigante's letter opener (a longsword)6A Gigante's thimble (an iron pot)

Name: Ginger
Text: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.

Name: Glaive
Text:
Heavy. You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy arma if it's a Melee arma and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged arma and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

Reach. A Reach arma adds 5 pies to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it.

Two-Handed. A Two-Handed arma requires two hands when you attack with it.

Mastery: Graze. If your attack roll with this arma misses a creature, you can deal dano to that creature equal to the ability modifier you used to make the attack roll. This dano is the same type dealt by the arma, and the dano can be increased only by increasing the ability modifier.

Name: Glamerweave
Text:
Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

Comun GlamerweaveUncommon Glamerweave

Name: Glamoured Studded Leather
Text: While wearing this armadura, you gain a +1 bonus to armadura Class. You can also take a Bonus Action to cause the armadura to assume the appearance of a normal set of clothing or some other kind of armadura. You decide what it looks like—including color, style, and accessories—but the armadura retains its normal bulk and weight. The illusory appearance lasts until you use this property again or doff the armadura.

Name: Glass Bottle
Text: A Glass Bottle holds up to 1½ pints.

Name: Glassblower's Tools
Text:
Ability: Intelligence

Utilize: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15)

Craft: Glass Bottle, Magnifying Glass, Spyglass, Vial

Artisan's Tools are each focused on crafting items and pursuing a trade. Each type of Artisan's Tools tools requires a separate proficiency.

If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Name: Glaur
Text:
Short, curved horns like a cornucopia. Played with valves, glaur sound like trumpets, while those without valves, known as gloon, have a more mournful sound.

If you have proficiency with a given musical instrument, you can add your proficiency bonus to any ability checks you make to play music with the instrument. A bard can use a musical instrument as a spellcasting focus. Each type of musical instrument requires a separate proficiency.

See the Tool Proficiencies entry for more information.

Proficiency with a musical instrument indicates you are familiar with the techniques used to play it. You also have knowledge of some songs commonly performed with that instrument.

History. Your expertise aids you in recalling lore related to your instrument.

Performance. Your ability to put on a bueno show is improved when you incorporate an instrument into your act.

Compose a Tune. As part of a descanso largo, you can compose a new tune and lyrics for your instrument. You might use this ability to impress a noble or spread scandalous rumors with a catchy tune.

Musical InstrumentActivityDCIdentify a tune10Improvise a tune20

Name: Glimmering Moonbow
Text:
This silver-and-black bow is engraved with the phases of the moon. You gain a +1 bonus to attack and dano rolls made with this magic arma.

When you hit with a ranged attack roll using this magic bow, el objetivo recibe an extra 1d6 radiant dano. If you load no ammunition in the arma, it produces its own, automatically creating one piece of magic ammunition when you make a ranged attack with it. The ammunition created by the bow vanishes the instant after it hits or misses a target.

While wielding this magic bow, you can use a bonus action to enter a semi-incorporeal state until the start of your next turn. While semi-incorporeal, you have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing dano. Once this bonus action is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Longbow (Glimmering Moon Longbow)Shortbow (Glimmering Moon Shortbow)

Name: Gloomwrought armadura
Text:
This intricate grayscale armadura was forged in the Shadowfell and is infused with that plane's gloom.

While you're wearing this armadura, you have advantage on Tiradas de salvacion you make to avoid or end the asustado condition on yourself.

This armadura has 3 charges. You can expend a charge to cast the Calm Emotions spell (save DC 15) from the armadura. This armadura regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn.

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Breastplate (Gloomwrought Breastplate)Chain Mail (Gloomwrought Chain Mail)Chain Shirt (Gloomwrought Chain Shirt)Half Plate armadura (Gloomwrought Half Plate armadura)Hide armadura (Gloomwrought Hide armadura)Leather armadura (Gloomwrought Leather armadura)Padded armadura (Gloomwrought Padded armadura)Plate armadura (Gloomwrought Plate armadura)anillo Mail (Gloomwrought anillo Mail)Scale Mail (Gloomwrought Scale Mail)Spiked armadura (Gloomwrought Spiked armadura)Splint armadura (Gloomwrought Splint armadura)Studded Leather armadura (Gloomwrought Studded Leather armadura)

Name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
Text: If you're hit by an attack roll made with a Ranged or Thrown arma while wearing these gloves, you can take a Reaction to reduce the dano by 1d10 plus your Dexterity modifier if you have a free hand. If you reduce the dano to 0, you can catch the ammunition or arma if it is Pequeno enough for you to hold in that hand.

Name: Gloves of Soul Catching
Text:
Your Constitution score is 20 while you wear these gloves. This property of the gloves has no effect on you if your Constitution is already 20 or higher.

After making a successful unarmed strike while wearing these gloves, you can use the gloves to deal an extra 2d10 force dano to el objetivo, and you regain a number of puntos de golpe equal to the force dano dealt. Alternatively, instead of regaining puntos de golpe in this way, you can choose to gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or tirada de salvacion you make before the end of your next turn.

Name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
Text: While wearing these gloves, climbing and swimming don't cost you extra movement, and you gain a +5 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks made to Trepar or Nadar.

Name: Gloves of Thievery
Text: These gloves are imperceptible while worn. While wearing them, you gain a +5 bonus to Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks.

Name: Glowrune Pigment
Text:
This set of 1d4 + 2 Pequeno paint pots contains pigments mixed from crushed luminescent gemstones. This magical paint bestows temporary magical gifts on creatures with runes drawn on their skin with this paint.

One paint pot contains enough pigment to paint one rune. A creature can spend 10 minutes to paint one of the following runes onto itself or another creature:

Journey Rune. difficult terrain doesn't cost the painted creature extra movement.

Life Rune. The painted creature gains 10 temporary puntos de golpe and has advantage on death Tiradas de salvacion.

Light Rune. The painted creature gains Vision en la oscuridad to a Alcance of 30 pies. If the painted creature already has Vision en la oscuridad from another source, the Alcance of its Vision en la oscuridad increases by 30 pies.

Mountain Rune. The painted creature is immune to being knocked derribado and has advantage on Strength and Constitution Tiradas de salvacion.

escudo Rune. The painted creature has advantage on Dexterity Tiradas de salvacion against effects that deal dano.

A creature can benefit from only one painted rune at a time, so a new rune painted on a creature has no effect unless the old one is removed first. The rune's benefits last for 8 hours or until the painted creature uses its action to wipe away the rune.

Name: Gnomengarde Grenade
Text:
This Pequeno metallic object is comprised of rune-covered parts made from different metals, linked together with a variety of gears, bands, bits, and bobs. The metals are all different colors, making the grenade shine with a rainbow of color when held up in the light.

As a bonus action, a creature can turn a special key to arm the grenade. Once armed, the grenade explodes in a matter of seconds. As an action, the wielder can hurl the grenade up to 120 pies. At the end of their turn, the grenade explodes. All creatures within 60 pies of the grenade when it explodes suffer the following effects:

cada criatura must make a DC 15 Dexterity tirada de salvacion, taking 28 (8d6) fire dano on a failed save, or half as much fire dano on a successful one.cada criatura must make a DC 15 Constitution tirada de salvacion. On a failed save, it recibe 28 (8d6) thunder dano and is aturdido hasta el final de its next turn. On a successful save, it recibe half as much thunder dano and is not aturdido.The wielder rolls on the chart* for the varita of wonder three times, rerolling any duplicate results. Any effects that specify a target affect all creatures in Alcance of the grenade when it explodes. Any effects that would affect the wielder of the varita instead affect the closest creature to the grenade when it goes off.The grenade explodes immediately if a creature places it in an extradimensional space or teleports while in possession of it. The effects of the explosion will be felt at both the origin and terminus of the teleportation, but only affecting all creatures within 30 pies of either location.

Name: Goat
Text: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.

Name: Goggles of Night
Text: While wearing these dark lenses, you have Vision en la oscuridad out to 60 pies. If you already have Vision en la oscuridad, wearing the goggles increases its Alcance by 60 pies.

Name: Goggles of Object Reading
Text:
These leather-framed goggles feature purple crystal lenses. While wearing the goggles, you have advantage on Intelligence (Arcana) checks made to reveal information about a creature or object you can see.

In addition, you can cast the identify spell using the googles. Once you do so, you can't do so again until the next dawn.

Name: Gold
Text: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.

Name: Gold Canary Figurine of Wondrous Power
Text:
This gold statuette is carved in the likeness of a canary and is Pequeno enough to fit in a pocket. If you use an action to speak the command word and throw the figurine to a point on the ground within 60 pies of you, the figurine becomes a living creature in one of two forms (you choose). If there isn't enough space for the creature where it would appear, the figurine doesn't become a creature. The two forms are as follows:

Gigante Canary Form. The figurine becomes a Gigante canary for up to 8 hours and can be ridden as a mount. Once the figurine has become a Gigante canary, it can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

Gold Dragon Form. While you are missing half or more of your puntos de golpe, you can speak a different command word and the figurine becomes an adult gold Dragon (see its stat block in the Monster Manual) for up to 1 hour. The Dragon can't use any legendary actions or lair actions. Once the figurine has become an adult gold Dragon, it can't be used this way again until 1 year has passed.

In either form, the creature is friendly to you and your companions. It understands your languages and obeys your spoken commands. If you issue no commands, the creature defends itself but recibe no other actions.

The creature exists for a Duracion specific to each form. At the end of the Duracion, the creature reverts to its figurine form. It reverts to a figurine early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the creature becomes a figurine again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the description.

Name: Gold Dragon Scale Mail
Text:
Dragon Scale Mail is made of the scales of one kind of Dragon. Sometimes dragons collect their cast-off scales and gift them. Other times, hunters carefully preserve the hide of a dead Dragon. In either case, Dragon Scale Mail is highly valued.

While wearing this armadura, you gain a +1 bonus to armadura Class, you have Advantage on Tiradas de salvacion against the breath weapons of Dragons, and you have Resistance to Fire dano.

Additionally, you can focus your senses as a Magic action to discern the distance and direction to the closest gold Dragon within 30 miles of yourself. This action can't be used again until the next dawn.

The wearer has Disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

Name: Golgari Guild Signet
Text:
This anillo, adorned with the symbol of Golgari, allows you to cast entangle. A guild signet is sometimes awarded to a guild member whose renown score in that guild is 5 or higher, as a reward for performing special services for the guild. Aside from its magical properties, the anillo is also an indicator of Golgari's recognition and favor.

A signet has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast the associated spell (save DC 13).

Name: Golgari Keyrune
Attunement: requiere sintonia By a Member of the Golgari Guild
Text:
Made from deep green jade with black veins, this keyrune has an insectile shape. It can transform into a Gigante scorpion for up to 6 hours. The scorpion has an Intelligence of 4 and can communicate with you telepathically while it is within 60 pies of you, though its messages are largely limited to describing the passage of potential prey.

When you use an action to speak the item's command word and place the keyrune on the ground in an unoccupied space within 5 pies of you, the keyrune transforms into a Gigante scorpion. If there isn't enough space for the creature, the keyrune doesn't transform.

The creature is friendly to you, your companions, and other members of your guild (unless those guild members are hostile to you). It understands your languages and obeys your spoken commands. If you issue no commands, the creature recibe the Dodge action and moves to avoid danger.

At the end of the Duracion, the creature reverts to its keyrune form. It reverts early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the creature reverts to its keyrune form, it can't transform again until 36 hours have passed.

Name: Goose Egg Trinket
Text:
Sometimes, an egg laid by a Gigante goose inexplicably contains some kind of Pequeno trinket or minor magic item. Once it lays a golden egg, a Gigante goose can't do so again for a year and a day.

You can use the Goose Egg Trinket table to determine the contents of a golden egg. A Gigante goose's egg can be a great way to give characters an item that's important to the story of an adventure or your campaign.

Goose Egg Trinketd12Egg Contents1The egg is empty, but the inside of the shell is inscribed with a poem or an intricate illustration.2The gold shell encloses a candy egg.3The egg holds a Pequeno toy goose that makes a loud honking noise when squeezed.4The egg contains a pocion of Gigante strength (hill Gigante) with no container.5The egg holds a pearl of power.6The egg contains a brooch of shielding.7The egg contains a figurine of wondrous power (silver raven) that activates automatically as the egg is opened, releasing what appears to be a living bird.8-12The egg is empty.

Name: Grappling Hook
Text: As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, a ledge, or another catch within 50 pies of yourself, and the hook catches on if you succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity (Acrobatics) check. If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can then Trepar it.

Name: Grasping Whip
Text:
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and dano rolls made with this magic whip. When you hit a creature or object that is Grande or smaller with this whip, you can pull that creature or object 5 pies toward you instead of dealing dano.

Finesse. When making an attack with a finesse arma, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and dano rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls.

Reach. This arma adds 5 pies to your reach when you attack with it. This property also determines your reach for opportunity attacks with a reach arma.

Name: Gravenhollow Compass anillo
Text: This gold anillo is fitted with a star ruby worth 1,000 gp. A detect magic spell reveals that the gem radiates a faint aura of divination magic. The gem's star-shaped core is a magical compass that guides the anillo's wearer along the safest, shortest route to Gravenhollow.

Name: Greataxe
Text:
Heavy. You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy arma if it's a Melee arma and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged arma and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

Two-Handed. A Two-Handed arma requires two hands when you attack with it.

Mastery: Cleave. If you hit a creature with a melee attack roll using this arma, you can make a melee attack roll with the arma against a second creature within 5 pies of the first that is also within your reach. On a hit, the second creature recibe the arma's dano, but don't add your ability modifier to that dano unless that modifier is negative. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.

Name: Greatclub
Text:
Two-Handed. A Two-Handed arma requires two hands when you attack with it.

Mastery: Push. If you hit a creature with this arma, you can push the creature up to 10 pies straight away from yourself if it is Grande or smaller.

Name: Greater Silver Sword
Attunement: requiere sintonia By a Creature That Has Psionic Ability
Text:
This magic arma grants a +3 bonus to attack and dano rolls made with it. While you hold the sword, you have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma Tiradas de salvacion, you are immune to being hechizado, and you have resistance to psychic dano. In addition, if you score a critical hit with it against a creature's astral body, you can cut the silvery cord that tethers el objetivo to its material body, instead of dealing dano.

Heavy. Creatures that are Pequeno or Diminuto have disadvantage on attack rolls with heavy weapons. A heavy arma's size and bulk make it too Grande for a Pequeno or Diminuto creature to use effectively.

Two-Handed. This arma requires two hands to use. This property is relevant only when you attack with the arma, not when you simply hold it.

Name: Greatsword
Text:
Heavy. You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy arma if it's a Melee arma and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged arma and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

Two-Handed. A Two-Handed arma requires two hands when you attack with it.

Mastery: Graze. If your attack roll with this arma misses a creature, you can deal dano to that creature equal to the ability modifier you used to make the attack roll. This dano is the same type dealt by the arma, and the dano can be increased only by increasing the ability modifier.

Name: Green Chromatic Rose
Text:
While this rose is held, it issues green gas as a harmless visual effect.

While holding the rose by its stem, you gain resistance to poison dano. If you would take more than 10 poison dano from a single source (after applying the resistance), the rose disintegrates, and you take no dano instead.

As an action, you can blow the petals from the rose to produce a 20-foot cone of poison. cada criatura in the cone must make a DC 15 Constitution tirada de salvacion, taking 3d10 poison dano on a failed save, or half as much dano on a successful one. Using this property destroys the rose.

Name: Green Copper Ewer
Text: Any poisonous liquid poured into the ewer is instantly transformed into an equal amount of sweet wine. Furthermore, a creature that grasps the ewer's handle can command the ewer to fill with 1 gallon of wine, and it can't produce more wine until the next dawn.

Name: Green Dragon Mask
Text:
This mottled green mask is surmounted by a frilled crest and has leathery spiked plates along its jaw. The mask reshapes to fit a wearer attuned to it. While you are wearing the mask and attuned to it, you can access the following properties

dano Absorption. You have resistance against poison dano. If you already have resistance to poison dano from another source, you instead have immunity to poison dano. If you already have immunity to poison dano from another source, whenever you are subjected to poison dano, you take none of that dano and regain a number of puntos de golpe equal to half the dano dealt of that type.

Draconico Majesty. While you are wearing no armadura, you can add your Charisma bonus to your armadura Class.

Dragon Breath. If you have a breath arma that requires rest to recharge, it gains a recharge of 6.

Dragon Sight. You gain Vision en la oscuridad out to 60 pies, or to an additional 60 pies if you already have that sense. Once per day, you can gain Vista ciega out to 30 pies for 5 minutes.

Dragon Tongue. You can speak and understand Draconico. You also have advantage on any Charisma check you make against Green Dragons.

Legendary Resistance. (1/Day) If you fail a tirada de salvacion, you can choose to succeed instead.

Water Breathing. You can breathe underwater.

Name: Green Dragon Scale Mail
Text:
Dragon Scale Mail is made of the scales of one kind of Dragon. Sometimes dragons collect their cast-off scales and gift them. Other times, hunters carefully preserve the hide of a dead Dragon. In either case, Dragon Scale Mail is highly valued.

While wearing this armadura, you gain a +1 bonus to armadura Class, you have Advantage on Tiradas de salvacion against the breath weapons of Dragons, and you have Resistance to Poison dano.

Additionally, you can focus your senses as a Magic action to discern the distance and direction to the closest green Dragon within 30 miles of yourself. This action can't be used again until the next dawn.

The wearer has Disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

Name: Grimoire Infinitus
Text:
Several of these spellbooks with gilded pages and silver-plated covers were created during the Age of Arcanum, but only one has been found since the Calamity ended. The book has an infinite number of pages, is three inches thick, eight inches wide, twelve inches long, and weighs three pounds.

Vestige of Divergence. This item is a Vestige of Divergence, see Vestiges of Divergence for more information.

Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

Grimoire Infinitus (Dormant)Grimoire Infinitus (Awakened)Grimoire Infinitus (Exalted)

Name: Grimoire Infinitus (Awakened)
Text:
Several of these spellbooks with gilded pages and silver-plated covers were created during the Age of Arcanum, but only one has been found since the Calamity ended. The book has an infinite number of pages, is three inches thick, eight inches wide, twelve inches long, and weighs three pounds.

Dormant. Most of the book is blank, but the following spells are recorded in the first pages of the tome: alarm, antimagic field, Bigby's hand, blight, charm person, confusion, control weather, create No muerto, detect thoughts, enlarge/reduce, fear, foresight, gaseous form, glyph of warding, legend lore, Leomund's Diminuto hut, mass suggestion, mislead, misty step, Mordenkainen's faithful hound, prismatic spray, ray of enfeeblement, silent image, teleport, and thunderwave.

You can use the grimoire as your spellbook, and you can scribe new spells into it as normal. When you prepare wizard spells using the grimoire, the number of wizard spells you can prepare increases by 1.

Awakened. When the Grimoire Infinitus reaches an awakened state, it gains the following properties:

While you carry the spellbook, you have advantage on Tiradas de salvacion against spells and magical effects.When you prepare wizard spells using the grimoire as your spellbook, the number of spells you can prepare increases by 1 again. Vestige of Divergence. This item is a Vestige of Divergence, see Vestiges of Divergence for more information.

While you carry the spellbook, you have advantage on Tiradas de salvacion against spells and magical effects.When you prepare wizard spells using the grimoire as your spellbook, the number of spells you can prepare increases by 1 again. Exalted. When the Grimoire Infinitus reaches an exalted state, it gains the following properties:

You can now use your Arcane Recovery feature twice between long rests, rather than once.When you prepare wizard spells using the grimoire as your spellbook, the number of spells you can prepare increases by 1 again. Vestige of Divergence. This item is a Vestige of Divergence, see Vestiges of Divergence for more information.

Name: Grovelthrash
Text:
Crafted from a single piece of obsidian, this warhammer of Torog hums with magical energy and is carved with the images of faces screaming in pain.

Versatile. This arma can be used with one or two hands. A dano value in parentheses appears with the property—the dano when the arma is used with two hands to make a melee attack.

Vestige of Divergence. This item is a Vestige of Divergence, see Vestiges of Divergence for more information.

Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

Grovelthrash (Dormant)Grovelthrash (Awakened)Grovelthrash (Exalted)

Name: Grovelthrash (Awakened)
Text:
Crafted from a single piece of obsidian, this warhammer of Torog hums with magical energy and is carved with the images of faces screaming in pain.

Sentience. Grovelthrash is a sentient neutral maligno arma with an Intelligence of 18, a Wisdom of 15, and a Charisma of 19. It has hearing and Vision en la oscuridad out to a Alcance of 120 pies.

The arma communicates telepathically with its wielder and can speak, read, and understand Abisal, Comun, and Infernal.

Personality. A covetous ultroloth named Ciria lives within Grovelthrash. The arma values material possessions and doling out pain. It compliments its wielder whenever they claim treasure and recibe pleasure in harming others.

Dormant. The warhammer grants the following benefits in its dormant state:

You can speak, read, and write Abisal and Infernal.You gain a +1 bonus to attack and dano rolls made with this magic arma. When you hit with an attack using this warhammer, you can deal an extra 2d6 bludgeoning dano to el objetivo. If you do, you take 1d6 psychic dano. The warhammer deals double dano to objects and structures.While holding this arma, you have advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks made to discern a lie spoken in a language you understand. Betrayer Artifact Properties[–] The Arms of the Betrayers advance in power in the same manner as the Vestiges of Divergence. In its dormant state, each of these artifacts has one minor beneficial property and one minor detrimental property. When the artifact attains an awakened state, it gains an additional minor beneficial property and an additional minor detrimental property. When the item reaches its exalted state, it gains a major beneficial property. See "Artifact Properties" in chapter 7 of the Dungeon Master's Guide for more information.

Awakened. When the warhammer reaches an awakened state, it gains the following properties:

The arma's bonus to attack and dano rolls increases to +2.You gain a burrowing speed equal to your walking speed. You can use your burrowing speed to move through sand, loose earth, mud, or ice, not solid rock.When a creature you can see within 30 pies of you hits you with an attack while you are wielding the warhammer, you can use your reaction to deal an amount of psychic dano to that creature equal to the dano you took from the attack. This property can't be used again until the next dawn. Versatile. This arma can be used with one or two hands. A dano value in parentheses appears with the property—the dano when the arma is used with two hands to make a melee attack.

Vestige of Divergence. This item is a Vestige of Divergence, see Vestiges of Divergence for more information.
