Text:
An orb of shielding is a polished, spherical chunk of crystal or stone aligned to one of the planes of existence. If you're a spellcaster, you can use this orb as a spellcasting focus.

If you're holding the orb when you take cold dano, you can use your reaction to reduce the dano by 1d4 (to a minimum of 0).

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Crystal (Risian Shale Crystal)Orb (Risian Shale Orb)

Name: Orb of Shielding (Shavarran Chert)
Text:
An orb of shielding is a polished, spherical chunk of crystal or stone aligned to one of the planes of existence. If you're a spellcaster, you can use this orb as a spellcasting focus.

If you're holding the orb when you take force dano, you can use your reaction to reduce the dano by 1d4 (to a minimum of 0).

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Crystal (Shavarran Chert Crystal)Orb (Shavarran Chert Orb)

Name: Orb of Shielding (Xorian Marble)
Text:
An orb of shielding is a polished, spherical chunk of crystal or stone aligned to one of the planes of existence. If you're a spellcaster, you can use this orb as a spellcasting focus.

If you're holding the orb when you take psychic dano, you can use your reaction to reduce the dano by 1d4 (to a minimum of 0).

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Crystal (Xorian Marble Crystal)Orb (Xorian Marble Orb)

Name: Orb of Skoraeus
Text:
Said to be infused with the wisdom and power of the god Skoraeus, this polished stone orb is veined with iridescent crystal that seems to glow from within. The orb is 8 inches in diameter and weighs 8 pounds, making it a palm-sized trinket for a stone Gigante but a more unwieldy item for a Mediano creature to use.

While holding this orb, you can use it as a spellcasting focus for your spells. You also gain the following benefits:

Abundant Componentes. The orb has 3 charges and regains all expended charges at dawn. When you cast a spell while holding this orb, you can expend up to 3 charges to ignore the spell's material Componentes with a gold piece cost, up to 300 gp per charge expended.

Astute Mind. You gain a +2 bonus to any Constitution tirada de salvacion you make to maintain your concentration on a spell.

Divine Sight. You can see normally in darkness, both magical and nonmagical, to a distance of 120 pies.

Name: Orb of Time
Text:
This orb can be used as an Arcane Focus.

While holding the orb, you can take a Magic action to determine whether it is morning, afternoon, evening, or nighttime. This property functions only on the Material Plane.

Name: Orb of the Stein Rune
Text:
This orb of granite is about the size of an adult human's fist. The stein (stone) rune appears on it in the form of crystalline veins that run across the surface. The orb has the following properties, which work only while it's on your person.

Indomitable Stand. As an action, you can channel the orb's magic to hold your ground. For the next minute or until you move any distance, you have advantage on all checks and Tiradas de salvacion to resist effects that force you to move. In addition, any enemy that moves to a space within 10 pies of you debe superar a DC 12 Strength tirada de salvacion o quedar unable to move any farther this turn.

Stone Soul. You can't be petrificado.

Earthen Step. You can cast meld into stone as a bonus action. Once you use this property, you can't use it again until you finish a descanso corto o largo.

Gift of Stone. You can transfer the orb's magic to a nonmagical item—a escudo or a pair of boots—by tracing the stein rune there with your finger. The transfer recibe 8 hours of work that requires the two items to be within 5 pies of each other. At the end, the orb is destroyed, and the rune appears in silver on the chosen item, which gains a benefit based on its form:

escudo. The escudo is now a rare magic item that requiere sintonia. While you wield it, you have resistance to all dano dealt by ranged arma attacks.

Boots. The pair of boots is now an uncommon magic item that requiere sintonia. While you wear the boots, you have advantage on Strength Tiradas de salvacion, and you can use your reaction to avoid being knocked derribado.

Name: Orb of the Veil
Text:
This onyx sphere bears deep, spiraling grooves and dangles from an iron chain. While the orb is on your person, you gain the following benefits:

Your Wisdom score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score.You gain Vision en la oscuridad out to a Alcance of 60 pies. If you already have Vision en la oscuridad, the orb increases its Alcance by 60 pies.You have advantage on Wisdom checks to find hidden doors and paths. Curse. The orb is cursed, and becoming attuned to it extends the curse to you. As long as you remain cursed, you are unwilling to part with the orb, keeping it on your person at all times. All nonmagical flames within 30 pies of you automatically extinguish, and fire dano dealt by you is halved.

Name: Orc Stone
Attunement: requiere sintonia By a Recipient Only
Text:
I saved the life of an orc, who gave me a stone with the symbol of the Many-Arrows tribe (a Humanoide skull pierced by three arrows) carved into it. The stone is an uncommon magic item that requiere sintonia, and only I can attune to it.

As an action, I can use the stone to summon the spirit of an orc warrior, which appears within 30 pies of me. The spirit uses the orc war chief stat block in the Monster Manual and disappears after 10 minutes or when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe. The spirit understands cualquier idioma I speak and obeys my commands.

After the stone is used three times, it turns to dust. (See Appendix B of Icewind Dale: Rime of the Frostmaiden)

Name: Orcsplitter
Attunement: requiere sintonia By a Dwarf, Fighter, or Paladin of bueno Alignment
Text:
A mighty axe wielded long ago by the dwarf king Torhild Flametongue, Orcsplitter is a battered arma that appears unremarkable at first glance. Its head is graven with the Enano runes for "orc," but the runes are depicted with a gap or slash through the markings; the word "orc" is literally split in two.

You gain the following benefits while holding this magic arma:

You gain a +2 bonus to attack and dano rolls made with it.When you roll a 20 on an attack roll with this arma against an orc, that orc debe superar a DC 17 Constitution tirada de salvacion or drop to 0 puntos de golpe.You can't be surprised by orcs while you're not incapacitado. You are also aware when orcs are within 120 pies of you and aren't behind total cover, although you don't know their location.You and any of your friends within 30 pies of you can't be asustado while you're not incapacitado. Sentience. Orcsplitter is a sentient, legal bueno arma with an Intelligence of 6, a Wisdom of 15, and a Charisma of 10. It can see and hear out to 120 pies and has Vision en la oscuridad. It communicates by transmitting emotions to its wielder, although on rare occasions it uses a limited form of telepathy to bring to the wielder's mind a couplet or stanza of ancient Enano verse.

Personality. Orcsplitter is grim, taciturn, and inflexible. It knows little more than the desire to face orcs in battle and serve a courageous, just wielder. It disdains cowards and any form of duplicity, deception, or disloyalty. The arma's purpose is to defend dwarves and to serve as a symbol of dwarven resolve. It hates the traditional foes of dwarves—giants, goblins, and, most of all, orcs—and silently urges its possessor to meet such creatures in battle.

Heavy. Creatures that are Pequeno or Diminuto have disadvantage on attack rolls with heavy weapons. A heavy arma's size and bulk make it too Grande for a Pequeno or Diminuto creature to use effectively.

Two-Handed. This arma requires two hands to use. This property is relevant only when you attack with the arma, not when you simply hold it.

Name: Orcus Figurine
Text:
Carved from an ogre's petrificado heart, the gray figurine depicts the Demon Prince of Undeath in ghastly detail, clutching his skull-topped varita in one hand and three severed heads by the hair in the other. The figurine smells like decaying flesh, and this scent is detectable out to a Alcance of 5 pies.

The figurine is a Diminuto object with AC 17, 3 puntos de golpe, and immunity to all types of dano except radiant dano. A detect maligno and bueno spell or similar magic reveals that the figurine has been desecrated. As long as it has at least 1 hit point, the figurine has the following magical properties:

No muerto within 30 pies of the figurine can't be turned.Dead creatures within 30 pies of the figurine can't be brought back to life.A creature that holds the figurine while praying to Orcus for at least 1 hour has a 10 percent chance of summoning a smoky avatar of the demon lord. Once this avatar is summoned, it can't be summoned again for 30 days. Orcus's avatar has the statistics of a wraith except that it's caotico maligno. It attacks all non-No muerto creatures it encounters, and it disappears after 1 hour or when reduced to 0 puntos de golpe.

Name: Order of the Gauntlet Trinket
Text: Order of the Gauntlet Trinkets1d6Trinket1A white feather as heavy as lead2An empty vial made from stained glass3A single cone of gold-flecked incense4A silken blindfold5One half of a pair of manacles6A tarnished aspergillum

Name: Ornithopter of Flying
Text:
You can use this contraption to Volar, provided your weight (including whatever you are wearing or carrying) doesn't exceed 300 pounds. The ornithopter has a flying speed of 30 pies, and it moves according to your spoken directions while you are riding it. It can't hover. If the ornithopter loses its rider while airborne, it falls and can't Volar again for 1d6 + 4 days.

The ornithopter is 8 pies long, has a 14-foot wingspan, and weighs 25 pounds.

Name: Orrery of the Wanderer
Text:
This delicate and exquisitely crafted clockwork orrery features multiple geared Componentes whose sweeping hands and dials represent the complex interplay of planar and magical realms. Standing two pies high, the orrery housing is a wondrous device imbued with magic of its own, but the power of its six clockwork Componentes makes the artifact even more potent.

The Orrery of the Wanderer was created by a renowned clockwork mage known only as Lottie. She crafted the relic as a means of tapping into the power of the planes, and to channel the divination and foretelling powers of the stars. But Lottie soon realized that her creation was far more powerful than she had intended. As it tapped into planar magic, the orrery began to manifest the darkness and malevolence inherent to some of the planes. Eventually, it would impress upon its owner a desire to open portals into the most cursed and dangerous worlds, including the Far Realm.

To prevent the orrery from ever being so used, Lottie scattered the Componentes that powered it, secreting them across the world. But the orrery's instinct for survival is strong, and its Componentes have a way of inexorably coming together over decades or centuries, found by treasure hunters, stolen by monsters, found and stolen again—and moving closer to each other all the time.

Random Properties. The orrery has the following randomly determined properties:

2 minor beneficial properties1 major beneficial property1 major detrimental propertiesThe random properties of the orrery might function only when all its Componentes are installed, or might function sporadically if any Componentes are missing.

The Sum of Its Parts. Each of the six Componentes that powers the Orrery of the Wanderer is a powerful magic relic in its own right:

The chronolometerThe dimensional loopThe far gearThe rotor of returnThe timepiece of travelThe wheel of starsCreatures can attune to the orrery's Componentes individually. If attuned to an individual component, a creature must hold the component to make use of its features. A creature can also attune to the orrery and all the Componentes installed in it. Attuning to an installed component doesn't count against the number of magic items you can normally attune to.

While a component is not installed in the orrery, its magic might function sporadically or with unpredictable side effects, as determined by the DM.

Future Echoes. With or without its Componentes, the orrery lets you catch momentary glimpses of the future that warn you of danger. As long as the orrery is within 30 pies of you, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

Into the Void. With or without its Componentes, the attuned orrery infuses your spirit with the tumultuous energy of the planes. Over time, your alignment changes to caotico neutral, and you are compelled to engage with and explore the most dangerous planar realms.

Master of Travel. While all six Componentes of the Orrery of the Wanderer are installed, the artifact has 7 charges. While touching the orrery, you can use an action and expend 1 or more charges to cast one of the following spells (save DC 17): contact other plane (3 charges), demiplane (6 charges), gate (7 charges), plane shift (5 charges), or teleportation circle (3 charges). The orrery regains 1d4 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn.

Name: Orzhov Guild Signet
Text:
This anillo, adorned with the symbol of Orzhov, allows you to cast command. A guild signet is sometimes awarded to a guild member whose renown score in that guild is 5 or higher, as a reward for performing special services for the guild. Aside from its magical properties, the anillo is also an indicator of Orzhov's recognition and favor.

A signet has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast the associated spell (save DC 13).

Name: Orzhov Keyrune
Attunement: requiere sintonia By a Member of the Orzhov Guild
Text:
This keyrune is carved from white marble with veins of black. The end is shaped like a thrull's head, with a gold faceplate affixed. On command, the keyrune transforms into a winged thrull for up to 2 hours. If you don't come from an Orzhov oligarch family, it serves you grudgingly, clownishly aping your movements and mannerisms while carrying out your orders.

When you use an action to speak the item's command word and place the keyrune on the ground in an unoccupied space within 5 pies of you, the keyrune transforms into a winged thrull. If there isn't enough space for the creature, the keyrune doesn't transform.

The creature is friendly to you, your companions, and other members of your guild (unless those guild members are hostile to you). It understands your languages and obeys your spoken commands. If you issue no commands, the creature recibe the Dodge action and moves to avoid danger.

At the end of the Duracion, the creature reverts to its keyrune form. It reverts early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the creature reverts to its keyrune form, it can't transform again until 36 hours have passed.

Name: Outer Essence Shard
Text:
This flickering crystal holds the essence of an Outer Plane. As an action, you can attach the shard to a Diminuto object (such as a arma or a piece of jewelry) or detach it. It falls off if your attunement to it ends. You can use the shard as a spellcasting focus while you hold or wear it.

Roll a d4 and consult the Outer Essence Shards table to determine the shard's essence and property. When you use a Metamagic option on a spell while you are holding or wearing the shard, you can use that property.

Outer Essence Shardsd4PropertyShard1LawfulOuter Essence Shard (legal)2ChaoticOuter Essence Shard (caotico)3GoodOuter Essence Shard (bueno)4EvilOuter Essence Shard (maligno)

Name: Outer Essence Shard (caotico)
Text:
This flickering crystal holds the essence of an Outer Plane. As an action, you can attach the shard to a Diminuto object (such as a arma or a piece of jewelry) or detach it. It falls off if your attunement to it ends. You can use the shard as a spellcasting focus while you hold or wear it.

When you use a Metamagic option on a spell while you are holding or wearing the shard, you can use that property.

Property. Choose una criatura who recibe dano from the spell. That target has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks made before the start of your next turn.

Name: Outer Essence Shard (maligno)
Text:
This flickering crystal holds the essence of an Outer Plane. As an action, you can attach the shard to a Diminuto object (such as a arma or a piece of jewelry) or detach it. It falls off if your attunement to it ends. You can use the shard as a spellcasting focus while you hold or wear it.

When you use a Metamagic option on a spell while you are holding or wearing the shard, you can use that property.

Property. Choose una criatura who recibe dano from the spell. That target recibe an extra 3d6 necrotic dano.

Name: Outer Essence Shard (bueno)
Text:
This flickering crystal holds the essence of an Outer Plane. As an action, you can attach the shard to a Diminuto object (such as a arma or a piece of jewelry) or detach it. It falls off if your attunement to it ends. You can use the shard as a spellcasting focus while you hold or wear it.

When you use a Metamagic option on a spell while you are holding or wearing the shard, you can use that property.

Property. You or una criatura of your choice that you can see within 30 pies of you gains 3d6 temporary puntos de golpe.

Name: Outer Essence Shard (legal)
Text:
This flickering crystal holds the essence of an Outer Plane. As an action, you can attach the shard to a Diminuto object (such as a arma or a piece of jewelry) or detach it. It falls off if your attunement to it ends. You can use the shard as a spellcasting focus while you hold or wear it.

When you use a Metamagic option on a spell while you are holding or wearing the shard, you can use that property.

Property. You can end one of the following conditions affecting yourself or una criatura you can see within 30 pies of you: hechizado, cegado, ensordecido, asustado, envenenado, or aturdido.

Name: Oversized Longbow
Text:
This unique arma can be used only by a Mediano or larger creature that has a Strength of 18 or higher. The bow shoots oversized arrows that deal piercing dano equal to 2d6 + the wielder's Strength modifier.

Alcance. A arma that can be used to make a ranged attack has a Alcance shown in parentheses after the ammunition or thrown property. The Alcance lists two numbers. The first is the arma's normal Alcance in pies, and the second indicates the arma's maximum Alcance. When attacking a target beyond normal Alcance, you have disadvantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the arma's long Alcance.

Ammunition. You can use a arma that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from the arma. Each time you attack with the arma, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack. Loading a one-handed arma requires a free hand. At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.

If you use a arma that has the ammunition property to make a melee attack, you treat the arma as an improvised arma. A sling must be loaded to deal any dano when used in this way.

Heavy. Creatures that are Pequeno or Diminuto have disadvantage on attack rolls with heavy weapons. A heavy arma's size and bulk make it too Grande for a Pequeno or Diminuto creature to use effectively.

Two-Handed. This arma requires two hands to use. This property is relevant only when you attack with the arma, not when you simply hold it.

Name: Ox
Text: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.

Name: Padded armadura
Text: The wearer has Disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

Name: Painter's Supplies
Text:
Ability: Wisdom

Utilize: Paint a recognizable image of something you've seen (DC 10)

Craft: Druidic Focus, Holy Symbol

Artisan's Tools are each focused on crafting items and pursuing a trade. Each type of Artisan's Tools tools requires a separate proficiency.

If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Name: Pale Tincture
Text: A creature subjected to Pale Tincture debe superar a DC 16 Constitution tirada de salvacion or take 3 (1d6) Poison dano and have the envenenado condition. The envenenado creature repeats the save every 24 hours, taking 3 (1d6) Poison dano on a failed save. The dano the poison deals can't be healed by any means while the creature remains envenenado. After seven successful saves against the poison, the creature is no longer envenenado.

Name: Pan Flute
Text:
Ability: Charisma

Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15)

If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Name: Paper
Text: One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

Name: Paper Bird
Text:
After you write a message of fifty words or fewer on this magic sheet of parchment and speak a creature's name, the parchment magically folds into a Diminuto paper bird and flies to the recipient whose name you uttered. The recipient must be on the same plane of existence as you, otherwise the bird turns into ash as it recibe flight.

The bird is an object that has 1 hit point, an armadura Class of 13, a flying speed of 60 pies, a Dexterity of 16 (+3), and a score of 1 (−5) in all other abilities, and it is immune to poison and psychic dano.

It travels to within 5 pies of its intended recipient by the most direct route, whereupon it turns into a nonmagical and inanimate sheet of parchment that can be unfolded only by the intended recipient. If the bird's puntos de golpe or speed is reduced to 0 or if it is otherwise immobilized, it turns into ash.

Paper birds usually come in Pequeno, flat boxes containing 1d6 + 3 sheets of the parchment.

Name: Parchment
Text: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

Name: Pariah's escudo
Text:
Soldiers of the Boros Legion consider it an honor to bear this escudo, even knowing that it might be the last honor they receive. The front of the escudo is sculpted to depict a grieving human face.

You gain a +1 bonus to AC for every two allies within 5 pies of you (up to a maximum of +3) while you wield this escudo. This bonus is in addition to the escudo's normal bonus to AC.

When a creature you can see within 5 pies of you recibe dano, you can use your reaction to take that dano, instead of the creature taking it. When you do so, the dano type changes to force.

Name: Pathfinder's Greataxe
Text:
When you wield this +1 greataxe, you always know the way to the nearest passage leading from underground toward the surface, as well as the approximate depth the axe is underground.

Heavy. Creatures that are Pequeno or Diminuto have disadvantage on attack rolls with heavy weapons. A heavy arma's size and bulk make it too Grande for a Pequeno or Diminuto creature to use effectively.

Two-Handed. This arma requires two hands to use. This property is relevant only when you attack with the arma, not when you simply hold it.

Name: Pearl of Power
Text: While this pearl is on your person, you can take a Magic action to regain one expended spell slot of level 3 or lower. Once you use the pearl, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

Name: Pearl of No muerto Detection
Text: This black pearl glows faintly when No muerto are within 120 pies of it.

Name: Pennant of the Vind Rune
Text:
This blue pennant is crafted from silk and is five pies long and whips about as if buffeted by a wind. The vind (wind) rune appears on its surface, looking almost like a cloud. The pennant has the following properties, which work only while it's on your person.

Wind Step. As an action, you Volar up to 20 pies. If you don't land at the end of this flight, you fall unless you have another means of staying aloft.

Comforting Wind. You can't suffocate.

Winds Grasp. As a reaction when you fall, you can cause yourself to take no dano from the fall. Once you use this property, you can't use it again until you finish a descanso corto o largo.

Wind Walker. While you are attuned to this rune, you can cast levitate as a bonus action. Once you use this property, you can't use it again until you finish a descanso corto o largo.

Gift of Wind. You can transfer the pennant's magic to a nonmagical item—a suit of armadura, a pair of boots, or a cloak—by tracing the vind rune there with your finger. The transfer recibe 8 hours of work that requires the two items to be within 5 pies of each other. At the end, the pennant is destroyed, and the rune appears in silver on the chosen item, which gains a benefit based on its form:

armadura. The armadura is now an uncommon magic item that requiere sintonia. You gain a bonus to speed of 5 pies while you wear the armadura, and if it normally imposes disadvantage on Stealth checks, it no longer does so.

Boots/Cloak. The pair of boots or cloak is now a rare magic item that requiere sintonia. While wearing the item, you can convert up to 20 pies of your movement on each of your turns into flight. If you don't land at the end of this flight, you fall unless you have another means of staying aloft. You can also cast feather fall once from the item, and you regain the ability to do so when you finish a descanso corto o largo.

Name: Pepper
Text: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.

Name: Peregrine Mask
Text: While wearing this winged helm, you have a flying speed of 60 pies. In addition, you have advantage on initiative rolls.

Name: Perfume
Text: Perfume comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying Perfume to yourself, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks made to influence an Indifferent Humanoide within 5 pies of yourself.

Name: Perfume of Bewitching
Text: This Diminuto vial contains magic perfume, enough for one use. You can take a Magic action to apply the perfume to yourself, and its effect lasts 1 hour. For the Duracion, you have Advantage on all Charisma (Deception and Persuasion) checks made to influence a creature within 5 pies of yourself.

Name: Periapt of Health
Text:
While wearing this pendant, you can take a Magic action to regain 2d4 + 2 puntos de golpe. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

In addition, you have Advantage on Tiradas de salvacion to avoid or end the envenenado condition while you wear this pendant.

Name: Periapt of Proof against Poison
Text: This delicate silver chain has a brilliant-cut black gem pendant. While you wear it, you have Immunity to the envenenado condition and Poison dano.

Name: Periapt of Wound Closure
Text:
While wearing this pendant, you gain the following benefits.

Life Preservation. Whenever you make a Death tirada de salvacion, you can change a roll of 9 or lower to a 10, turning a failed save into a successful one.

Natural Healing Boost. Whenever you roll a Hit Point Die to regain puntos de golpe, double the number of puntos de golpe it restores.

Name: petrificado Grung Egg
Text:
While this egg is on your person, you can use an action to speak its command word and regain one expended spell slot. If the expended slot was of 4th level or higher, the new slot is 3rd level. Once you have used the egg, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

Additionally, while you are attuned to the egg, you gain resistance to poison dano.

The egg turns to dust and is destroyed if it leaves the Tomb of the Nine Gods.

Name: Philter of Love
Text:
The next time you see a creature within 10 minutes after drinking this philter, you are hechizado by that creature and have the hechizado condition for 1 hour.

This rose-hued, effervescent liquid contains one easy-to-miss bubble shaped like a heart.

Name: Piercer
Text:
You have a +1 bonus to attack and dano rolls made with this magic arma.

A character attuned to the sword regains the maximum possible number of puntos de golpe from expended Hit Dice. However, the attuned character must eat twice as much food each day (a minimum of 2 pounds) to avoid exhaustion (see "The Environment" in chapter 8 of the Player's Handbook.)

Finesse. When making an attack with a finesse arma, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and dano rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls.

Light. A light arma is Pequeno and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when fighting with two weapons.

Name: Pig
Text: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.

Name: Pike
Text:
Heavy. You have Disadvantage on attack rolls with a Heavy arma if it's a Melee arma and your Strength score isn't at least 13 or if it's a Ranged arma and your Dexterity score isn't at least 13.

Reach. A Reach arma adds 5 pies to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it.

Two-Handed. A Two-Handed arma requires two hands when you attack with it.

Mastery: Push. If you hit a creature with this arma, you can push the creature up to 10 pies straight away from yourself if it is Grande or smaller.

Name: Pipe of Remembrance
Text: This long, delicate wooden pipe features a bowl made from smooth river stone. When the pipe is lit, smoke exhaled from it does not dissipate, instead lingering around the bearer. After 10 minutes, the smoke forms moving shapes that reenact the bearer's most impressive and heroic achievements for 5 minutes. When this realistic performance is complete, the smoke dissipates. The pipe can't be used this way again until the next dawn.

Name: Pipe of Smoke Monsters
Text: While smoking this pipe, you can take a Magic action to exhale a puff of smoke that recibe the form of a creature, such as a Dragon, a flumph, or a slaad. The form must be Pequeno enough to fit in a 1-foot cube and loses its shape after a few seconds, becoming an ordinary puff of smoke.

Name: Pipes of Haunting
Text: These pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can take a Magic action to play them and expend 1 charge to create an eerie, spellbinding tune. cada criatura of your choice within 30 pies of you debe superar a DC 15 Wisdom tirada de salvacion or have the asustado condition for 1 minute. A creature that fails the save repeats it at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature that succeeds on its save is immune to the effect of these pipes for 24 hours.

Name: Pipes of Pestilence
Text: If you play these pipes as a Magic action, you summon one Swarm of Corrupted Rats in an unoccupied space within 60 pies of yourself. The swarm is Friendly to you and your allies for as long as you continue to play the pipes each round as a Magic action. While Friendly, the swarm is under your control, obeys your commands, and recibe no action other than to defend itself if you issue it no commands. Once your control ends, the swarm vanishes, and the pipes can't be used again until the next dawn.

Name: Pipes of the Sewers
Text:
While these pipes are on your person, ordinary rats and Gigante rats are Indifferent toward you and won't attack you unless you threaten or harm them.

The pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. If you play the pipes as a Magic action, you can take a Bonus Action to expend 1 to 3 charges, calling forth one Swarm of Rats with each expended charge if enough rats are within half a mile of you to be called in this fashion (as determined by the DM). If there aren't enough rats to form a swarm, the charge is wasted. Called swarms move toward the music by the shortest available route but aren't under your control otherwise.

Whenever a Swarm of Rats that isn't under another creature's control comes within 30 pies of you while you are playing the pipes, the swarm makes a DC 15 Wisdom tirada de salvacion. On a successful save, the swarm behaves as it normally would and can't be swayed by the pipes' music for the next 24 hours. On a failed save, the swarm is swayed by the pipes' music and becomes Friendly to you and your allies for as long as you continue to play the pipes each round as a Magic action. A Friendly swarm obeys your commands. If you issue no commands to a Friendly swarm, it defends itself but otherwise recibe no actions. If a Friendly swarm starts its turn more than 30 pies away from you, your control over that swarm ends, and the swarm behaves as it normally would and can't be swayed by the pipes' music for the next 24 hours.

Name: Pistol
Type: arma, Martial arma, Ranged arma, Firearm
Text:
Alcance. A Alcance arma has a Alcance in parentheses after the Ammunition or Thrown property. The Alcance lists two numbers. The first is the arma's normal Alcance in pies, and the second is the arma's long Alcance. When attacking a target beyond normal Alcance, you have Disadvantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the long Alcance.

Ammunition. You can use a arma that has the Ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from it. The type of ammunition required is specified with the arma's Alcance. Each attack expends one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed arma). After a fight, you can spend 1 minute to recover half the ammunition (round down) you used in the fight; the rest is lost.

Loading. You can fire only one piece of ammunition from a Loading arma when you use an action, a Bonus Action, or a Reaction to fire it, regardless of the number of attacks you can normally make.

Mastery: Vex. If you hit a creature with this arma and deal dano to the creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

Name: Pitcher
Text: A pitcher holds 1 gallon of liquid.

Name: Piwafwi (Cloak of Elvenkind)
Text:
This dark spider silk cloak is made by drow. It is a cloak of elvenkind. It loses its magic if exposed to sunlight for 1 hour without interruption.

While you wear this cloak with its hood up, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see you have disadvantage. and you have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide, as the cloak's color shifts to camouflage you. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

Name: Piwafwi of Fire Resistance
Text:
This dark spider silk cloak is made by drow. It is a cloak of elvenkind. It also grants resistance to fire dano while you wear it. It loses its magic if exposed to sunlight for 1 hour without interruption.

While you wear this cloak with its hood up, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to see you have disadvantage. and you have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide, as the cloak's color shifts to camouflage you. Pulling the hood up or down requires an action.

Name: Pixie Dust
Text:
As an action, you can sprinkle this dust on yourself or another creature you can see within 5 pies of you. The recipient gains a flying speed of 30 pies and the ability to hover for 1 minute. If the creature is airborne when this effect ends, it falls safely to the ground, taking no dano and landing on its pies.

A Pequeno packet holds enough pixie dust for one use.

Name: Planar Philosopher Trinket
Text: d6Trinket1Locket with a picture of my mentor and an inscription I can't read2Bleached cranium rat skull with colored glass beads in its eye sockets3Torn parchment with half a rebus painted on it4Bracelet of twisted razorvine stems5Fragment of a bronze blade covered in verdigris6Broken holy symbol of a forgotten god

Name: Planecaller's Codex
Text:
The pages of this book are bound in Infernal hide, and its cover is embossed with a diagram of the Great Wheel of the multiverse. When found, the book contains the following spells: banishment, find familiar, gate, magic circle, planar binding, and summon Elemental. It functions as a spellbook for you.

While you are holding the book, you can use it as a spellcasting focus for your wizard spells.

The book has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can use the charges in the following ways while holding it:

If you spend 1 minute studying the book, you can expend 1 charge to replace one of your prepared wizard spells with a different spell in the book. The new spell must be of the conjuration school.When you cast a conjuration spell that summons or creates una criatura, you can expend 1 charge to grant that creature advantage on attack rolls for 1 minute.

Name: Plate armadura
Text:
The wearer has Disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

If the wearer has a Strength score lower than 15, their speed is reduced by 10 pies.

Name: Plate armadura of Etherealness (*)
Text:
* This generic variant has the same name and source as the item Plate armadura of Etherealness.

While you're wearing this armadura, you can take a Magic action and use a command word to gain the effect of the Etherealness spell. The spell ends immediately if you remove the armadura or take a Magic action to repeat the command word. This property of the armadura can't be used again until the next dawn.

Base items. This item variant can be applied to the following base items:

Half Plate armadura (Half Plate armadura of Etherealness)Plate armadura (Plate armadura of Etherealness)

Name: Plate of Knight's Fellowship
Text:
This gleaming set of silver-and-gold plate armadura never tarnishes.

While wearing this armadura, you can use a bonus action to summon the spirit of a warrior to your aid. The spirit's corporeal form manifests in an unoccupied space of your choice within 30 pies of you, and it uses the knight stat block. The spirit disappears when it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or after 1 minute, whichever comes first.

The spirit is an ally to you and your companions. In combat, the spirit shares your initiative count but recibe its turn immediately after yours. The spirit obeys your commands (No requiere accion by you); if you don't issue any commands, the spirit recibe the Dodge action and uses its movement to avoid danger.

Once this bonus action is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

Plate consists of shaped, interlocking metal plates to cover the entire body. A suit of plate includes gauntlets, heavy leather boots, a visored helmet, and thick layers of padding underneath the armadura. Buckles and straps distribute the weight over the body.

The wearer has Disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

If the wearer has a Strength score lower than 15, their speed is reduced by 10 pies.

Name: Platinum
Text: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.

Name: Platinum Scarf
Text:
This scarf is made of sturdy cloth and covered in platinum-colored scales.

As an action, you can pull a scale from the scarf and speak a command word. When you do so, choose one of the following effects:

Breath of Life. The scale disappears, and you or a creature you touch regains 10d4 puntos de golpe.

Platinum escudo. For 1 hour or until you dismiss it (No requiere accion), the scale becomes a +1 escudo, which you or another creature can use. A creature wielding the escudo has immunity to radiant dano.

Radiant Hammer. For 1 hour or until you dismiss it (No requiere accion), the scale becomes a magic light hammer, which you or another creature can use. The arma deals 2d4 radiant dano, instead of the bludgeoning dano normal for a light hammer. It deals an extra 2d4 radiant dano to chromatic dragons.

Once three scales have been pulled from the scarf, no more scales can be removed until the next dawn, when all the missing scales grow back. If you pull off a scale but don't speak a command word, it disappears after 1 minute.

Name: Playing Cards
Text:
Ability: Wisdom

Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20)

If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Name: Poison Absorbing Tattoo
Text:
Produced by a special needle, this magic tattoo features designs that emphasize one color (violet).

Tattoo Attunement. To attune to this item, you hold the needle to your skin where you want the tattoo to appear, pressing the needle there throughout the attunement process. When the attunement is complete, the needle turns into the ink that becomes the tattoo, which appears on the skin.

If your attunement to the tattoo ends, the tattoo vanishes, and the needle reappears in your space.

dano Resistance. While the tattoo is on your skin, you have resistance to poison dano.

dano Absorption. When you take poison dano, you can use your reaction to gain immunity against that instance of the dano, and you regain a number of puntos de golpe equal to half the dano you would have taken. Once this reaction is used, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

Name: Poison Soaked Kukri
Text:
You can take a Bonus Action to magically coat the blade of this Dagger with poison. The poison remains for 1 minute or until an attack using this arma hits a creature. That creature debe superar a DC 13 Constitution tirada de salvacion or take 2d8 Poison dano and have the envenenado condition for 1 minute. This Bonus Action can't be used again this way until the next dawn.

Finesse. When making an attack with a Finesse arma, use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and dano rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls.

Light. When you take the Attack action on your turn and attack with a Light arma, you can make one extra attack as a Bonus Action later on the same turn. That extra attack must be made with a different Light arma, and you don't add your ability modifier to the extra attack's dano unless that modifier is negative. For example, you can attack with a Shortsword in one hand and a Dagger in the other using the Attack action and a Bonus Action, but you don't add your Strength or Dexterity modifier to the dano roll of the Bonus Action unless that modifier is negative.

Thrown. If a arma has the Thrown property, you can throw the arma to make a ranged attack, and you can draw that arma as part of the attack. If the arma is a Melee arma, use the same ability modifier for the attack and dano rolls that you use for a melee attack with that arma.

Mastery: Nick. When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can make it as part of the Attack action instead of as a Bonus Action. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.

Name: Poisoner's Kit
Text:
Ability: Intelligence

Utilize: Detect a envenenado object (DC 10)

Craft: Basic Poison

If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Name: Pole
Text: A Pole is 10 pies long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 pies away. If you must make a Strength (Athletics) check as part of a High or Long Jump, you can use the Pole to vault, giving yourself Advantage on the check.

Name: Pole of Angling
Text: This item functions as a Pole. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to cause it to transform into a fishing pole with a hook, a line, and a reel, or have the fishing pole revert to a Pole.

Name: Pole of Collapsing
Text: This item functions as a Pole. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to collapse it into a 1-foot-long vara for ease of storage (the pole's weight doesn't change) or cause the 1-foot-long vara to revert to a Pole. The vara elongates only as far as the surrounding space allows.

Name: Portable Hole
Text:
This fine black cloth, soft as silk, is folded up to the dimensions of a handkerchief. It unfolds into a circular sheet 6 pies in diameter.

You can take a Magic action to unfold a Portable Hole and place it on or against a solid surface, whereupon the Portable Hole creates an extradimensional hole 10 pies deep. The cylindrical space within the hole exists on a different plane of existence, so it can't be used to create open passages. Any creature inside an open Portable Hole can exit the hole by climbing out of it.

You can take a Magic action to close a Portable Hole by taking hold of the edges of the cloth and folding it up. Folding the cloth closes the hole, and any creatures or objects within remain in the extradimensional space. No matter what's in it, the hole weighs next to nothing.

If the hole is folded up, a creature within the hole's extradimensional space can take an action to make a DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check. On a successful check, the creature forces its way out and appears within 5 pies of the Portable Hole. A closed Portable Hole holds enough air for 1 hour of breathing, divided by the number of breathing creatures inside.

Placing a Portable Hole inside an extradimensional space created by a Bag of Holding, Heward's Handy Haversack, or similar item instantly destroys both items and opens a gate to the Astral Plane. The gate originates where the one item was placed inside the other. Any creature within 10 pies of the gate and not behind Total Cover is sucked through it and deposited in a random location on the Astral Plane. The gate then closes. The gate is one-way only and can't be reopened.

Name: Portable Ram
Text: You can use a Portable Ram to break down doors. When doing so, you gain a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help you use the ram, giving you Advantage on this check.

Name: Portal Compass
Text: This portable arcane instrument points in the direction of the last portal it passed through while it and the portal are on the same plane of existence. If that portal no longer exists, the needle becomes static until the compass passes through a new portal.

Name: Portfolio Keeper
Text:
At rank 2, you gain the use of a weathered leather pouch that is an uncommon magic item. The portfolio keeper holds and organizes notes, brochures, and business cards bearing your contact information. It also has an inexhaustible supply of brochures related to your franchise's current branding scheme.

When you meet someone for the first time, their details and a rough sketch are magically stored on a Pequeno parchment card in the portfolio keeper. You can access the details of any such stored card as a bonus action.

Cards of Sending. At rank 3, the power of your portfolio keeper becomes more potent, making it a rare magic item. When you give out a business card stored in your portfolio keeper, you can choose to have the card allow its recipient to contact you through your sending stone as if they had cast a sending spell. A business card loses this power seven days after it has been given out, and no more than five cards can have this power at one time.

You can also use your sending stone to cast sending and contact anyone who has one of your business cards. Once you use this feature of the stone, you cannot use it again until dawn seven days later.

Charming Introduction. Also at rank 4, you are able to make a focused effort to keep a potential customer's attention. When you provide a Humanoide with a business card from your portfolio keeper, you can cast charm person on them (save DC 15). The spell ends prematurely if the character loses the business card.

Name: Pot of Awakening
Text:
If you plant an ordinary shrub in this 10-pound clay pot and let it grow for 30 days, the shrub magically transforms into an Awakened Shrub at the end of that time. When the shrub awakens, its roots break the pot, destroying it.

The awakened shrub is Friendly toward you and obeys your commands. Absent commands from you, it does nothing.

Name: pocion of Acid Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Acid dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Advantage
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain advantage on one ability check, attack roll, or tirada de salvacion of your choice that you make within the next hour.

This pocion recibe the form of a sparkling, golden mist that moves and pours like water.

Name: pocion of Animal Friendship
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you can cast the level 3 version of the Animal Friendship spell (save DC 13).

Agitating this pocion's muddy liquid brings little bits into view: a fish scale, a hummingbird feather, a cat claw, or a squirrel hair.

Name: pocion of Aqueous Form
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you transform into a pool of water. You return to your true form after 10 minutes or if you are incapacitado or die.

You're under the following effects while in this form:

Liquid Movement. You have a swimming speed of 30 pies. You can move over or through other liquids. You can enter and occupy the space of another creature. You can rise up to your normal height, and you can pass through even Diminuto openings. You extinguish nonmagical flames in any space you enter.

Watery Resilience. You have resistance to nonmagical dano. You also have advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution Tiradas de salvacion.

Limitations. You can't talk, attack, cast spells, or activate magic items. Any objects you were carrying or wearing meld into your new form and are inaccessible, though you continue to be affected by anything you're wearing, such as armadura.

Name: pocion of Clairvoyance
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain the effect of the Clairvoyance spell (no Concentration required).

An eyeball bobs in this pocion's yellowish liquid but vanishes when the pocion is opened.

Name: pocion of Climbing
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain a Trepar Speed equal to your Speed for 1 hour. During this time, you have Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to Trepar.

This pocion is separated into brown, silver, and gray layers resembling bands of stone. Shaking the bottle fails to mix the colors.

Name: pocion of Cloud Gigante Strength
Text:
When you drink this pocion, your Strength score changes to 27 for 1 hour. The pocion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score.

This pocion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a cloud Gigante.

Name: pocion of Cold Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Cold dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Comprehension
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain the effect of the Comprehend Languages spell for 1 hour.

This pocion's liquid is a clear concoction with bits of salt and soot swirling in it.

Name: pocion of Diminution
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain the "reduce" effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 1d4 hours (no Concentration required).

The red in the pocion's liquid continuously contracts to a Diminuto bead and then expands to color the clear liquid around it. Shaking the bottle fails to interrupt this process.

Name: pocion of Dragon's Majesty
Text: This pocion looks like liquid gold, with a single scale from a chromatic, gem, or metallic Dragon suspended in it. When you drink this pocion, you transform into an adult Dragon of the same kind as the Dragon the scale came from. The transformation lasts for 1 hour. Any equipment you are wearing or carrying melds into your new form or falls to the ground (your choice). For the Duracion, you use the game statistics of the adult Dragon instead of your own, but you retain your languages, personality, and memories. You can't use a Dragon's Change Shape or its legendary or lair actions.

Name: pocion of Fire Breath
Text:
After drinking this pocion, you can take a Bonus Action to exhale fire at a target within 30 pies of yourself. el objetivo makes a DC 13 Dexterity tirada de salvacion, taking 4d6 Fire dano on a failed save or half as much dano on a successful one. The effect ends after you exhale the fire three times or when 1 hour has passed.

This pocion's orange liquid flickers, and smoke fills the top of the container and wafts out whenever it is opened.

Name: pocion of Fire Gigante Strength
Text:
When you drink this pocion, your Strength score changes to 25 for 1 hour. The pocion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score.

This pocion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a fire Gigante.

Name: pocion of Fire Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Fire dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Flying
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain a Volar Speed equal to your Speed for 1 hour and can hover. If you're in the air when the pocion wears off, you fall unless you have some other means of staying aloft.

This pocion's clear liquid floats at the top of its container and has cloudy white impurities drifting in it.

Name: pocion of Force Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Force dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Frost Gigante Strength
Text:
When you drink this pocion, your Strength score changes to 23 for 1 hour. The pocion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score.

This pocion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a frost Gigante.

Name: pocion of Gaseous Form
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain the effect of the Gaseous Form spell for 1 hour (no Concentration required) or until you end the effect as a Bonus Action.

This pocion's container seems to hold fog that moves and pours like water.

Name: pocion of Gigante Size
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you become Enorme for 24 hours if you are Mediano or smaller, otherwise the pocion does nothing. For that Duracion, your Strength becomes 25, if it isn't already higher, and your hit point maximum is doubled (your current puntos de golpe are doubled when you drink the pocion). In addition, the reach of your melee attacks increases by 5 pies.

Everything you are carrying and wearing also increases in size for the Duracion. When rolling dano for weapons enlarged in this manner, roll three times the normal number of dice; for example, an enlarged longsword would deal 3d8 slashing dano (instead of 1d8), or 3d10 slashing dano (instead of 1d10) when used with two hands.

When the effect ends, any puntos de golpe you have above your hit point maximum become temporary puntos de golpe. This pocion is a pale white liquid made from the tongue of a Gigante clam, with a pungent aroma akin to that of rotting algae. It tastes sweet, however, when consumed.

Name: pocion of Gigante Strength
Text:
Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

pocion of Hill Gigante StrengthPotion of Frost Gigante StrengthPotion of Stone Gigante StrengthPotion of Fire Gigante StrengthPotion of Cloud Gigante StrengthPotion of Storm Gigante Strength

Name: pocion of Greater Healing
Text: You regain 4d4 + 4 puntos de golpe when you drink this pocion. The pocion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

Name: pocion of Greater Invisibility
Text: This pocion's container looks empty but feels as though it holds liquid. When you drink the pocion, you have the invisible condition for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Growth
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain the "enlarge" effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 10 minutes (no Concentration required).

The red in the pocion's liquid continuously expands from a Diminuto bead to color the clear liquid around it and then contracts. Shaking the bottle fails to interrupt this process.

Name: pocion of Healing
Text: This pocion is a magic item. As a Bonus Action, you can drink it or administer it to another creature within 5 pies of yourself. The creature that drinks the magical red fluid in this vial regains 2d4 + 2 puntos de golpe. The pocion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

Name: pocion of Healing (*)
Text:
* This item group has the same name and source as the item pocion of healing.

Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

pocion of HealingPotion of Greater HealingPotion of Superior HealingPotion of Supreme Healing

Name: pocion of Heroism
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain 10 Temporary puntos de golpe that last for 1 hour. For the same Duracion, you are under the effect of the Bless spell (no Concentration required).

This pocion's blue liquid bubbles and steams as if boiling.

Name: pocion of Hill Gigante Strength
Text:
When you drink this pocion, your Strength score changes to 21 for 1 hour. The pocion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score.

This pocion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a hill Gigante.

Name: pocion of Invisibility
Text: This pocion's container looks empty but feels as though it holds liquid. When you drink the pocion, you have the invisible condition for 1 hour. The effect ends early if you make an attack roll, deal dano, or cast a spell.

Name: pocion of Invulnerability
Text:
For 1 minute after you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to all dano.

This pocion's syrupy liquid looks like liquefied iron.

Name: pocion of Lightning Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Lightning dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Longevity
Text:
When you drink this pocion, your physical age is reduced by 1d6 + 6 years, to a minimum of 13 years. Each time you subsequently drink a pocion of Longevity, there is 10 percent cumulative chance that you instead age by 1d6 + 6 years.

Suspended in this amber liquid is a Diminuto heart that, against all reason, is still beating. These ingredients vanish when the pocion is opened.

Name: pocion of Maximum Power
Text:
The first time you cast a dano-dealing spell of 4th level or lower within 1 minute after drinking the pocion, instead of rolling dice to determine the dano dealt, you can instead use the highest number possible for each die.

This glowing purple liquid smells of sugar and plum, but it has a muddy taste.

Name: pocion of Mind Control
Text:
Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

pocion of Mind Control (Bestia)pocion of Mind Control (Humanoide)pocion of Mind Control (monster)

Name: pocion of Mind Control (Bestia)
Text:
When you drink a pocion of mind control, you can cast a dominate spell (save DC 15) on a specific creature if you do so before the end of your next turn. If you don't, the pocion is wasted.

A pocion of mind control produces the effect of a dominate Bestia spell. If el objetivo's initial tirada de salvacion fails, the effect lasts for 1 hour, with no concentration required on your part. The hechizado creature has disadvantage on new Tiradas de salvacion to break the effect during this time.

Name: pocion of Mind Control (Humanoide)
Text:
When you drink a pocion of mind control, you can cast a dominate spell (save DC 15) on a specific creature if you do so before the end of your next turn. If you don't, the pocion is wasted.

A pocion of mind control produces the effect of a dominate person spell. If el objetivo's initial tirada de salvacion fails, the effect lasts for 1 hour, with no concentration required on your part. The hechizado creature has disadvantage on new Tiradas de salvacion to break the effect during this time.

Name: pocion of Mind Control (monster)
Text:
When you drink a pocion of mind control, you can cast a dominate spell (save DC 15) on a specific creature if you do so before the end of your next turn. If you don't, the pocion is wasted.

A pocion of mind control produces the effect of a dominate monster spell. If el objetivo's initial tirada de salvacion fails, the effect lasts for 1 hour, with no concentration required on your part. The hechizado creature has disadvantage on new Tiradas de salvacion to break the effect during this time.

Name: pocion of Mind Reading
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain the effect of the Detect Thoughts spell (save DC 13) for 10 minutes (no Concentration required).

This pocion's dense, purple liquid has an ovoid cloud of pink floating in it.

Name: pocion of Necrotic Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Necrotic dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Poison
Text:
This concoction looks, smells, and tastes like a pocion of Healing or another beneficial pocion. However, it is actually poison masked by illusion magic. Identify reveals its true nature.

If you drink this pocion, you take 4d6 Poison dano and debe superar a DC 13 Constitution tirada de salvacion or have the envenenado condition for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Poison Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Poison dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Polychromy
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you and everything you are wearing or carrying take on a rainbow-hued appearance for 1 hour. During that time, you can use a bonus action to turn any color or combination of colors you choose. If you mimic the colors of your surroundings, your hues continually shift to match your surroundings, and you have advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks until you change your colors again or the pocion wears off.

The pocion is separated into seven brightly colored bands of immiscible liquids and has a syrupy taste.

Name: pocion of Possibility
Text:
When you drink this clear pocion, you gain two Fragments of Possibility, each of which looks like a Diminuto, grayish bead of energy that follows you around, staying within 1 foot of you at all times. Each fragment lasts for 8 hours or until used.

When you make an attack roll, an ability check, or a tirada de salvacion, you can expend your fragment to roll an additional d20 and choose which of the d20s to use. Alternatively, when an attack roll is made against you, you can expend your fragment to roll a d20 and choose which of the d20s to use, the one you rolled or the one the attacker rolled.

If the original d20 roll has advantage or disadvantage, you roll your d20 after advantage or disadvantage has been applied to the original roll.

While you have one or more Fragments of Possibility from this pocion, you can't gain another Fragment of Possibility from any source.

Name: pocion of Psionic Fortitude
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you have advantage for 1 hour on Tiradas de salvacion you make to avoid or end the hechizado or aturdido condition on yourself.

This black pocion swirls with shimmering flecks of pink and purple.

Name: pocion of Psychic Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Psychic dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Pugilism
Text:
After you drink this pocion, each Unarmed Strike you make deals an extra 1d6 Force dano on a hit. This effect lasts 10 minutes.

This pocion is a thick green fluid that tastes like spinach.

Name: pocion of Radiant Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Radiant dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Resistance
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to one type of dano for 1 hour. The DM chooses the type or determines it randomly by rolling on the following table.

d10Damage Type1Acid2Cold3Fire4Force5Lightning6Necrotic7Poison8Psychic9Radiant10Thunder

Name: pocion of Speed
Text:
When you drink this pocion, you gain the effect of the Haste spell for 1 minute (no Concentration required) without suffering the wave of lethargy that typically occurs when the effect ends.

This pocion's yellow fluid is streaked with black and swirls on its own.

Name: pocion of Stone Gigante Strength
Text:
When you drink this pocion, your Strength score changes to 23 for 1 hour. The pocion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score.

This pocion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a stone Gigante.

Name: pocion of Storm Gigante Strength
Text:
When you drink this pocion, your Strength score changes to 29 for 1 hour. The pocion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than that score.

This pocion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of fingernail from a storm Gigante.

Name: pocion of Superior Healing
Text: You regain 8d4 + 8 puntos de golpe when you drink this pocion. The pocion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

Name: pocion of Supreme Healing
Text: You regain 10d4 + 20 puntos de golpe when you drink this pocion. The pocion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

Name: pocion of Thunder Resistance
Text: When you drink this pocion, you have Resistance to Thunder dano for 1 hour.

Name: pocion of Vitality
Text:
When you drink this pocion, it removes any Exhaustion levels you have and ends the envenenado condition on you. For the next 24 hours, you regain the maximum number of puntos de golpe for any Hit Point Die you spend.

This pocion's crimson liquid regularly pulses with dull light, calling to mind a heartbeat.

Name: pocion of Watchful Rest
Text: When you drink this pocion, you gain the following benefits for the next 8 hours: magic can't put you to sleep, and you can remain awake during a descanso largo and still gain its benefits. This sweet, amber-colored brew has no effect on creatures that don't require sleep, such as elves.

Name: pocion of Water Breathing
Text:
You can breathe underwater for 24 hours after drinking this pocion.

This pocion's cloudy green fluid smells of the sea and has a jellyfish-like bubble floating in it.

Name: Potions of Healing
Text:
Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

pocion of HealingPotion of Greater HealingPotion of Superior HealingPotion of Supreme Healing

Name: Potter's Tools
Text:
Ability: Intelligence

Utilize: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15)

Craft: Jug, Lamp

Artisan's Tools are each focused on crafting items and pursuing a trade. Each type of Artisan's Tools tools requires a separate proficiency.

If you have proficiency with a tool, add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have Advantage on the check too.

Name: Pouch
Text: A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

Name: Prehistoric Figurine of Wondrous Power
Text:
Larger and more roughly hewn than typical figurines of wondrous power, these statuettes depict dinosaurs and related creatures from the earliest days of the world.

As an action, you can throw a prehistoric figurine of wondrous power to a point on the ground within 60 pies of yourself while speaking a command word, whereupon the figurine magically transforms into a living creature. If the space where the creature would appear is occupied by other creatures or objects, or if there isn't enough space for the creature, the figurine doesn't become a creature.

The creature is friendly to you and your companions. It understands your languages and obeys your spoken commands. If you issue no commands, the creature defends itself but recibe no other actions. See the Monster Manual for the creature's statistics.

The creature exists for a Duracion specific to each figurine. At the end of the Duracion, the creature reverts to its statuette form. It reverts to a figurine early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the creature becomes a figurine again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the figurine's description.

Multiple variations of this item exist, as listed below:

Prehistoric Figurine of Wondrous Power, Carnelian TriceratopsPrehistoric Figurine of Wondrous Power, Jasper Tyrannosaurus RexPrehistoric Figurine of Wondrous Power, Kyanite PteranodonPrehistoric Figurine of Wondrous Power, Pyrite Plesiosaurus

When the creature becomes a figurine again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the figurine's description.

Carnelian Triceratops. This figurine becomes a triceratops for up to 6 hours and can be ridden as a mount. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 10 days have passed.

Name: Prehistoric Figurine of Wondrous Power, Jasper Tyrannosaurus Rex

When the creature becomes a figurine again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the figurine's description.

Jasper Tyrannosaurus Rex. This figurine, crafted from rare green jasper, becomes a tyrannosaurus rex for up to 1 hour. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 14 days have passed.

Whenever you command the figurine while it's in tyrannosaurus rex form (including commanding it to revert to figurine form), you must roll a d20. On a 1, you lose control of the figurine, and it becomes hostile to you and your companions until it is reduced to 0 puntos de golpe, at which point it reverts to figurine form.

It reverts to a figurine early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the creature becomes a figurine again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the figurine's description.

Kyanite Pteranodon. This figurine becomes a pteranodon for up to 8 hours. If your size is Mediano or smaller, you can ride the pteranodon as a mount. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 7 days have passed.

Name: Prehistoric Figurine of Wondrous Power, Pyrite Plesiosaurus
Text:
Larger and more roughly hewn than typical figurines of wondrous power, these statuettes depict dinosaurs and related creatures from the earliest days of the world.

As an action, you can throw a prehistoric figurine of wondrous power to a point on the ground within 60 pies of yourself while speaking a command word, whereupon the figurine magically transforms into a living creature. If the space where the creature would appear is occupied by other creatures or objects, or if there isn't enough space for the creature, the figurine doesn't become a creature.

The creature is friendly to you and your companions. It understands your languages and obeys your spoken commands. If you issue no commands, the creature defends itself but recibe no other actions. See the Monster Manual for the creature's statistics.

The creature exists for a Duracion specific to each figurine. At the end of the Duracion, the creature reverts to its statuette form. It reverts to a figurine early if it drops to 0 puntos de golpe or if you use an action to speak the command word again while touching it. When the creature becomes a figurine again, its property can't be used again until a certain amount of time has passed, as specified in the figurine's description.

Pyrite Plesiosaurus. This figurine becomes a plesiosaurus for up to 12 hours and can be ridden as a mount. Once it has been used, it can't be used again until 4 days have passed.

While you are riding the plesiosaurus, you can use it to cast water breathing at will.

Name: Prespra
Text: A creature subjected to Prespra debe superar a DC 11 Constitution tirada de salvacion or take 3 (1d6) Poison dano and have the envenenado condition. The creature also has the cegado condition while envenenado in this way. The creature repeats the save at the start of each of its turns, taking 3 (1d6) Poison dano on a failed save. On a successful save, the effect ends for the creature.

Name: Pressure Capsule
Text: This Pequeno capsule is made of beeswax blended with sand and a variety of enchanted water plants. A creature who consumes a pressure capsule ignores the effects of swimming at depths greater than 100 pies (see "Unusual Environments" in chapter 5 of the Dungeon Master's Guide).

Name: Pride Silk
Text: The hearty silk unique to the region has long been a point of pride with the locals. When processed and woven properly, the resulting cloth is pride silk: an extremely flexible material with the durability of tanned leather. Pride silk has become a favorite cloth for use on military ship sails, war banners, and other utilitarian applications, but has also gained popularity in affluent circles. High-end clothing made from pride silk is both fashionable and protective, leading many nobles and wealthy merchants to seek full outfits and formal gowns made with it. The tailors skilled enough to create such outfits are few and far between, so while pride silk might be expensive as a raw material, outfits made of the cloth are prohibitively expensive for most Comun folk.

Name: Pride Silk Outfit
Text: An outfit made of pride silk weighs 4 pounds and costs 500 gp. If you aren't wearing armadura, your base armadura Class is 11 + your Dexterity modifier while wearing it.

Name: Priest's Pack
Text: A Priest's Pack contains the following items: Backpack, Blanket, Holy Water, Lamp, 7 days of Rations, Robe, and Tinderbox.

Name: Prismari Primer
Text:
The Prismari Primer is a magic textbook created at Strixhaven's Prismari College. The primer has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. If you make a Dexterity (Acrobatics) or a Charisma (Performance) check while holding the primer, you can expend 1 charge to give yourself a 1d4 bonus to the check, immediately after you roll the d20.

In addition, if you study the primer at the end of a descanso largo, you can choose one 1st-level spell from the bard or sorcerer spell list. Before you finish your next descanso largo, you can cast the chosen spell once without a spell slot if you are holding the primer. Your spellcasting ability for this spell is your choice of Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma.

Name: Prismari Trinket
Text:
When you make your character, you may roll once on the Prismari Trinkets table, instead of on the Trinkets table in the Player's Handbook, for your starting trinket.

Prismari Trinketsd6Trinket1A pair of rose-tinted glasses with glittery frames2A stoppered glass bottle that, when opened, plays a brassy orchestral piece3A quartet of hovering water motes in a vial4A bandolier of watercolor paints5A tiara capped with a crystal that crackles with harmless lightning6An iridescent quill

Name: Professor Orb
Text:
Each professor orb recibe the form of a smooth, solid, 5-pound sphere of smoky gray quartz about the size of a grapefruit. Close examination reveals two or more pinpricks of silver light deep inside the sphere.

A Professor Orb is sentient and has the personality of a scholar. Its alignment is determined by rolling on the alignment table in the "Sentient Magic Items" section in chapter 7 of the Dungeon Master's Guide. Regardless of its disposition, the orb has an Intelligence of 18, and Wisdom and Charisma scores determined by rolling 3d6 for each ability. The orb speaks, reads, and understands four languages, and can see and hear normally out to a Alcance of 60 pies. Unlike most sentient items, the orb has no will of its own and can't initiate a conflict with the creature in possession of it.

A Professor Orb has extensive knowledge of four narrow academic subjects. When making an Intelligence check to recall lore from any of its areas of expertise, the orb has a +9 bonus to its roll (including its Intelligence modifier).

In addition to the knowledge it possesses, a professor orb can cast the mage hand cantrip at will. It uses the spell only to transport itself. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence.

Name: Professor Skant
Text:
The professor orb owned by Vellynne Harpell and stolen by Nass Lantomir calls itself Professor Skant. It is legal bueno, and it has a Wisdom of 11 and a Charisma of 9 (as a professor orb, it has an Intelligence of 18). It speaks and reads Comun, Draconico, Elfico, and Loross (the dead language of the Empire of Netheril). Professor Skant is a chatterbox and assumes all humanoids are dunderheads. When elaborating on its areas of expertise, it adopts an unintentionally patronizing tone. It has the following four areas of expertise:

The history of Netheril (see the "Fate of Netheril" sidebar)Vampirism and the traits of vampiresRituals surrounding the making, bottling, and drinking of Elverquisst (a rare, ruby-colored elven liquor distilled from sunshine and rare summer fruits)The tarrasque (see the Monster Manual)When making an Intelligence check to recall lore from any of its areas of expertise, the orb has a +9 bonus to its roll (including its Intelligence modifier).

Professor Skant recibe the form of a smooth, solid, 5-pound sphere of smoky gray quartz about the size of a grapefruit. Close examination reveals two or more pinpricks of silver light deep inside the sphere.

Professor Skant can see and hear normally out to a Alcance of 60 pies. Unlike most sentient items, the orb has no will of its own and can't initiate a conflict with the creature in possession of it.

In addition to the knowledge it possesses, Professor Skant can cast the mage hand cantrip at will. It uses the spell only to transport itself. Its spellcasting ability is Intelligence.

Name: Propeller Helm
Attunement: requiere sintonia By a Pequeno Humanoide
Text: While worn, the helm allows its wearer to use an action to cast the levitate spell, requiring no Componentes. The helm's propeller spins and whirs loudly until the spell ends. Each time the spell ends, there is a 50 percent chance that the helm loses its magic and becomes nonmagical.

Name: Prosthetic Limb
Text: This magic item replaces a lost limb—a hand, an arm, a foot, a leg, or a similar body part. While the prosthetic is attached, it functions identically to the part it replaces. You can detach or reattach it as a Magic action, and it can't be removed against your will while you are alive.

Name: Prosthetic Limb
Text: This magic item replaces a lost limb—a hand, an arm, a foot, a leg, or a similar body part. While the prosthetic is attached, it functions identically to the part it replaces. You can detach or reattach it as a Magic action, and it can't be removed against your will while you are alive.

Name: Protective Verses
Text:
This leather-bound spellbook is reinforced with iron and silver fittings and an iron lock (DC 20 to open). As an action, you can touch the book's cover and cause it to lock as if you cast arcane lock on it. When found, the book contains the following spells: arcane lock, dispel magic, globe of invulnerability, glyph of warding, Mordenkainen's private sanctum, protection from maligno, and symbol. It functions as a spellbook for you.

While you are holding the book, you can use it as a spellcasting focus for your wizard spells.

The book has 3 charges, and it regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can use the charges in the following ways while holding it:

If you spend 1 minute studying the book, you can expend 1 charge to replace one of your prepared wizard spells with a different spell in the book. The new spell must be of the abjuration school.When you cast an abjuration spell, you can expend 1 charge to grant a creature you can see within 30 pies of you 2d10 temporary puntos de golpe.

Name: Psi Crystal
Attunement: requiere sintonia By a Creature with an Intelligence Score of 3 or Higher
Text:
This crystal grants you telepathy for as long as you remain attuned to it. See the introduction of the Monster Manual for rules on how this telepathy works.

The crystal also glows with a purplish inner light while you are attuned to it.

The higher your intelligence, the greater the light's intensity and the greater the Alcance of the telepathy (see the Psi Crystal Properties table).
